title: AH AutoReconnect
description: Automatically reconnect to your last Server on disconnect - perfect for standing AFK
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b2e6c203fcb48e45470bb50469bd53545a5a40f.png)
## Overview

Automatically reconnect to your last server on disconnect! - Best tool for standing AFK on regularly restarting servers

## Features

- Automatically reconnect to your last server on disconnect
- instantly reconnect to your current Server through game menu screen (view pictures in gallery)
- Adjust how many reconnect attempts are taken
- Set your Max Attempts
- enable / diable Auto-Start
- Easy to use UI  
- multi porpuse, also working on kick etc.
